allow: PowerShell($base = "C:\\Users\\nbasile\\Documents\\PARTITA IVA\\POST\\Ai_PRogettazione Sociale\\Amministrazione Condivisa\\normativa"; Get-ChildItem -Path $base -Recurse -File | Select-Object @{N="Path";E={$_.FullName.Replace\($base+"\\",""\)}}, @{N="SizeKB";E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}}, Extension | Sort-Object Path | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($base = "C:\\Users\\nbasile\\Documents\\PARTITA IVA\\POST\\Ai_PRogettazione Sociale\\Amministrazione Condivisa\\normativa"; Get-ChildItem -Path $base -File | Select-Object Name, Length | Sort-Object Name | Out-File -FilePath "$base\\_inventario-pre-smistamento.txt" -Encoding utf8; Write-Output "Backup salvato in _inventario-pre-smistamento.txt")

PowerShell($tools = @\(\); foreach \($cmd in @\("python", "py", "pdftotext", "pdftoppm", "soffice", "pip"\)\) { try { $r = & where.exe $cmd 2>$null; if \($r\) { $tools += "$cmd : OK \($\($r[0]\)\)" } else { $tools += "$cmd : NO" } } catch { $tools += "$cmd : NO" } }; $tools -join "`n")
